name: Microwave Chinese Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken in a rectangular microwavable dish, 11 x 7 x 1 1/2 inches.
2. Mix remaining ingredients except apricots.
3. Brush chicken with soy sauce mixture, turning pieces to coat.
4. Arrange chicken, meaty sides up and thickest parts to outside edges, in the dish.
5. Cover tightly and microwave on high for 10 minutes.
6. Brush with soy sauce mixture; rotate the dish 1/2 turn.
7. Cover and microwave for 6 to 10 minutes longer or until thickest pieces of chicken are done.
8. Arrange apricots around chicken.
9. Brush chicken and apricots with soy sauce mixture.
10. Microwave uncovered about 1 minute, or until apricots are hot.
6 servings. Oven Directions:
1. Heat oven to 375°F.
2. Place chicken in a rectangular pan, 13 x 9 x 2 inches.
3. Prepare soy sauce mixture as directed.
4. Brush chicken with soy sauce mixture, turning pieces to coat.
5. Bake chicken uncovered, meaty sides up, for 50 to 60 minutes, brushing occasionally until thickest pieces of chicken are done.
6. About 5 minutes before chicken is done, arrange apricots around chicken.
7. Brush chicken and apricots with soy sauce mixture.
8. Bake about 5 minutes or until apricots are hot.
